data.body: Implementation and held-out TDD complete. Focused oracle: 28 passed, including deterministic pins, malformed parser matrix, canonical Jira-local IDs, archived inbound blockers, dual-role targets, clean tracker SHA/error mapping, exact structured pre-LLM abort, all sign paths, and full-DSSE legacy-reader compatibility. Mutation removing pin emission correctly failed. make check passed. Full default suite passed: 6771 passed, 28 skipped, 112 deselected in 1526.43s. Independent review caught and resolved Jira-ID validation and the 800-line module cap (attest.py now 799 LOC).
